title: calamus modestus
intro: Calamus modestus, also known as Indian calamus, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. Native to tropical regions of India, it has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, boasting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as alleviating symptoms of digestive issues, such as bloating and gas. Calamus modestus is often used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it a popular remedy in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
